name: Old-Fashioned Crumb Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sour Milk (mix 1 tablespoon white vinegar with 1 cup milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. To make sour milk, mix 1 tablespoon white vinegar with 1 cup milk.
2. Combine flour, butter, and cinnamon in a bowl until the mixture resembles cornmeal. Set aside 1 cup of this mixture for the top layer.
3. In another bowl, combine sugar, nutmeg, salt, beaten egg, sour milk, and baking soda. Mix slowly until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square baking dish.
5. Sprinkle the reserved crumb mixture over the top of the cake.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
A light, spicy snack cake
